description: Create a parametric PCB mounting standoff using the Spreadsheet workbench. The model should consist of a 3D Part Design Body (a post on a flange with a through-hole) with all dimensions linked to a spreadsheet via expressions. The spreadsheet must include the following aliases and values: outer_diameter (8 mm), inner_diameter (3.2 mm), height (10 mm), flange_diameter (12 mm), and flange_height (1.5 mm). Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/parametric_standoff.FCStd.
